summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Mother's Day landing page for StudioMix. All major functionality working correctly including navbar navigation, carousel, template selection, card editor, download, WhatsApp sharing, and registration form.

ui_bugs.issue: Template 'Usar esta plantilla' button has timeout on mobile viewport - element appears outside viewport during click

passed_tests: Navbar with functional links and smooth scroll
Hero section with title and CTA functioning
Carousel navigation with arrows and dots
Generate Card button creates preview and shows share section
Download Card button clickable and functional
Registration form with all fields and validation
success_percentage: frontend: 95% (17/18 features working perfectly, 1 minor mobile issue)
